//: The directory containing the bash scripts for commands
Message of the day displayed after successful login
motd:
Welcome to AetherCLI!
Type '?' or double-tab for help.
//: If true, enforces user login via users.json authentication
File storing PBKDF2 hashed user credentials
If true, prevents multiple concurrent logins for the same user
Number of failed login attempts before locking out the session
Enable or disable the status bar at the bottom of the screen
Define the command tree structure below. Each command can have:
- name:        The exact word typed by the user
- activation:  The shell command executed (can use ${AETHERCLI_SCRIPTS_DIR})
- syntax:      Full syntax description shown in help
- args:        'append' to pass trailing arguments to the shell command
